channel.title: History on Andre Walter
channel.description: Recent content in History on Andre Walter

item.title: Swiss Cantonal Governments 1848-2017
item.description: I’m currently working with Patrick Emmenegger on creating a database on the ideological composition of cantonal governments. We were able to compile a time series for most cantons starting in the mid 19th century. A complete Time-Series Cross-Section is available for all cantons for 1894 onwards (except Appenzell Inner-Rhodes which starts 1928 and, of course, Jura). Below, you can find the first exploratory results. The first plot displays the smoothed government volatility for 24 cantons (excl.
